meta.author: rosis_s@ascendly.one
meta.notes: A DIFFERENT client with completely different modules, a Decision engine, and a KNOWLEDGE layer. Proves nothing is hardcoded: more analysis modules, knowledge injection (case studies + pricing + competitors) feeding richer enrichment than a homepage crawl could, and multiple campaign assets. Same engine, same schema.

strategy.business_overview: RevCadence builds AI software that automates revenue operations for mid-market SaaS companies.

offers.name: RevCadence Platform
offers.description: AI agents that clean CRM data, score pipeline, and draft follow-ups.
offers.value_prop: RevOps team output without the headcount.

strategy.positioning: Not another dashboard — autonomous agents that DO the RevOps work, not just visualize it.
strategy.market: Mid-market B2B SaaS, 50–1000 employees, with an existing CRM (HubSpot or Salesforce).
strategy.objectives: Book demos with RevOps / Sales Ops leaders.
strategy.campaign_goals: Demos booked with economic buyers; secondary: warm replies from champions.
strategy.icp: B2B SaaS, 50–1000 employees, has a RevOps/SalesOps function, uses HubSpot or Salesforce, growth-stage (Series A–C).
strategy.non_icp: Agencies, pre-revenue startups, non-SaaS, companies <20 employees, or anyone without a CRM.

buyer_personas.title: Head of RevOps
buyer_personas.pains: Manual CRM hygiene, slow pipeline reviews, rep time lost to admin.
buyer_personas.goals: Clean data, faster cycles, more selling time.
buyer_personas.triggers: Recent funding, new VP Sales, hiring RevOps roles.

strategy.constraints: Do not contact existing customers or named competitors. Avoid companies in active security incidents.

knowledge_base.label: Series B SaaS — 40% faster pipeline reviews
knowledge_base.content: A 220-person Series B SaaS using HubSpot cut pipeline review prep from 6 hours to under 1 by letting RevCadence agents auto-update deal stages and flag stale opportunities. Forecast accuracy improved 18%.

knowledge_base.label: Salesforce mid-market — data hygiene
knowledge_base.content: A Salesforce shop reduced duplicate/incomplete records by 73% in 30 days with RevCadence's CRM cleaning agents, recovering ~9 rep-hours/week.

knowledge_base.label: 2026 Pricing
knowledge_base.content: Starter $2k/mo (1 agent), Growth $6k/mo (3 agents + scoring), Enterprise from $12k/mo (custom agents + SSO). Annual = 2 months free.

knowledge_base.label: Competitive landscape
knowledge_base.content: Vs Clari/Gong: those analyze; RevCadence acts. Vs in-house scripts: no maintenance burden, governed + auditable. Vs generic AI: purpose-built for CRM objects.

knowledge_base.label: Common objections
knowledge_base.content: ‘We already have RevOps’ -> agents augment the team, not replace it. ‘Security?’ -> SOC2, scoped CRM permissions, full audit log. ‘Switching cost?’ -> read-only pilot in 1 week.
